sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $75M contract with a major logistics provider is a clear positive for revenue and business growth.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands sees 8% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% drop in new customer orders directly indicates weakening demand and will negatively impact future revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
